svg.title: SPSC ring memory ordering: release-store and acquire-load
svg.desc: Two vertical timelines for producer and consumer. Producer writes slot then does a release-store on tail. Consumer does an acquire-load on tail, then reads the slot. The happens-before edge between the store and load guarantees the consumer sees the written slot.
svg.text: No mutex needed: producer owns tail (write), consumer owns head (write) — they never race on the same variable
